getProjectPlanning.name: AgentSwipe App — Even Feature Task planning

tasks.name: Implement Events Discovery Experience
tasks.description: Develop the Flutter Events module by integrating with the Events API. Display upcoming events with search, filtering, pagination, and event detail screens. Implement loading, empty, offline, and error states, support pull-to-refresh, and allow users to view complete event information. The implementation should consume the standardized API contract and automatically reflect content managed through the CMS.

tasks.name: Develop Events Management API
tasks.description: Design and implement GraphQL APIs for managing event data, including listing, filtering, searching, pagination, and event detail retrieval. Define a consistent response model, validation rules, and error handling that can be consumed by Flutter and Web applications. Expose only published content created and maintained through the CMS.

tasks.name: Develop Responsive Events Portal
tasks.description: Build a responsive Events experience for the Web application by consuming the Events API. Implement searchable event listings, filtering, pagination, and event detail pages with responsive layouts for desktop and mobile. Ensure the UI stays synchronized with the shared API contract and CMS-managed content.

tasks.name: View and Update Event Details
tasks.description: Implement the Events management interface in the CMS that allows administrators to view the list of events and update existing event information, including title, description, date, time, location, images, status, and metadata. Persist all changes through the API so updated event information is immediately available to Flutter and Web applications.
